items.title: Bring home the posable LEGO Super Mario Piranha Plant set with 37% Prime Day savings to $38
items.summary:
LEGO Super Mario Piranha Plant set

Buy for $38 (Reg. $60)

What we love

One of our favorite LEGO Super Mario sets, you can take advantage of the 2026 low price here to expand your collection with the brick-built recreation of one of Mario’s most famous enemies. It stands at 9 inches tall once finished, and you get the added benefit of posing its jaws, leaves, and body.

items.summary: Valve says it's using a randomized purchase queue to make the experience "less frustrating and more fair."

items.title: Insane early Prime Day deals on Beats gear: Headphones up to $230 off, buds from $43
items.summary: We had been tracking some seriously notable deals on Beats headphones and earbuds over the last couple weeks now, but with the official Best Buy Tech Fest going live this morning and Amazon’s early Prime Day deals kicking into overdrive, most models have now dropped to the lowest prices we have tracked all-year, and in some cases, the lowest of all-time.

items.title: A new unpatchable flaw in Apple chips opens the door to an iPhone jailbreak
items.summary: European offensive cybersecurity company Paradigm Shift released details of a flaw and a technique to exploit it that opens the door for hackers to unlock and break into older iPhones.

items.title: Google DeepMind bets $75M on AI’s future in Hollywood with A24 deal
items.summary: Google DeepMind and A24 are teaming up to build AI filmmaking tools.

items.title: Best Buy’s Tech Fest Prime Day sale knocks up to $650 off all-new 2026 Copilot+ PCs with Snapdragon X2 and Ryzen AI 400 chips
items.summary: Best Buy is running a sale of its own to compete with Amazon’s 2026 Prime Day, having already kicked off its new Tech Fest event with major discounts across PCs, Apple gear, home appliances, and more. The retailer is also offering notable markdowns on Windows laptops and desktops, particularly the new 2026 Copilot+ PC models with savings of up to $650. These are the first deals we’re tracking on many of the new Windows notebooks that debuted earlier this year, sporting next-generation processors and NPUs built for AI tasks. You’ll find offers on models powered by Qualcomm’s latest Snapdragon X2 Plus, AMD’s Ryzen AI 400 series, and Intel’s Core Ultra Series 3 “Panther Lake” processors. We’ve rounded up some of the best options from the sale below, so be sure to check them out before the deals disappear.

items.title: Early Prime Day Apple deals are wild: Best prices ever on current Apple Watch lineup, AirPods Max 2 $150 off, AirTag 2, more
items.summary: We are still roughly 12 hours out from the official start of Prime Day 2026, but there are already some seriously fantastic all-time lows now live on Apple gear. The most popular (and affordable) Apple Watch Series 11 models have now hit the lowest price ever, Apple Watch Ultra 3 is now $150 off, and the new 2026 AirPods Max 2 have dropped to the best price ever at $150 off as well. Those deals also join the deepest deals to date on the AirTag 2 from $22 a pop as well as the latest Apple Magic Mouse, and more. Scope it all out down below.

items.title: Apple’s latest AirTag 2 hits Amazon all-time low pricing ahead of Prime Day from $22 each
items.summary: Amazon is now delivering some of the first price cut on AirTag 2. Amazon’s early Prime Day Apple deals are coming in hot this morning with new all-time low pricing on the most affordable Apple Watch Series 11 models, all-time lows on Apple Watch Ultra 3 at $150 off, and a massive $150 price cut on the 2026 AirPods Max 2, but now it’s time for AirTag 2.

items.title: This Baseus Picogo Qi2 15W 5,000mAh MagSafe power bank is the smallest one in my EDC, and it’s just $17 today
items.summary:
Baseus Picogo 5,000mAh 15W Qi2 MagSafe power bank with kickstand

Buy for $17.50 (Reg. $30)

Apply WNGVZ79V during checkout.

What we love

This Qi2-certified 5,000mAh power bank is roughly the size of a credit card, making it super easy to slip into a pocket or bag. It pairs an aluminum build with a soft, scratch-resistant magnetic surface, and it also has a built-in kickstand, LED battery indicators, and USB-C wired charging at up to 20W when you do not want to rely on MagSafe.

items.title: LG’s UltraGear 720Hz dual-mode OLED gaming monitor hits lowest price at $300 off ahead of Prime Day
items.summary: As part of its early Prime Day deals, Amazon is now offering LG’s 27-inch UltraGear dual-mode OLED gaming monitor for $699.99 shipped. This is one of the fastest OLED monitors out there, sporting a panel that can hit refresh rates of up to 720Hz. It typically goes for $1,000, but today’s deal takes $300 off its usual going rate to land it $50 below the previous all-time low it first hit earlier this year. This is the lowest we have seen this model drop to date, and you can learn more about it in detail below.

items.summary: Joining the hundreds of new early Prime Day deals going live today, your Monday afternoon lineup of the best Android game and app deals is now ready to roll, including titles like Blasphemous, Dungeon Clawler, Hitman Sniper, Bridge Constructor Portal, Mythic Trials 2, Lara Croft GO, Dungeon Village, Earn to Die, and more. Alongside Best Buy’s massive Tech Fest Prime Day sale that is now live with up to $650 off all-new 2026 Copilot+ PCs, we also have the official Walmart Deals Prime Day sale with deep deals on Galaxy Tab S10 Lite and the ultra-affordable Galaxy Tab A11+ at the $169 low. As for the apps, everything awaits below.

items.title: Get pro-tier cleaning with this Greenworks 2,700 PSI electric pressure washer down at its $330 2026 low
items.summary: As part of its Early Prime Day Sale, Amazon is continuing the offer on the popular Greenworks Pro 2,700 PSI Brushless Electric Pressure Washer down at $329.99 shipped, which beats out the direct website pricing by $50. It’s down from its full price of $450, which we’ve only seen going as high as $380 for the last few months. There have been a few discounts in 2026 on this model, dropping the cost to $360 in February, $350 in April, then holding out at $330 since May. The $120 markdown is holding strong still, giving you time to grab it at the best price we have tracked in 2026. You can also shop the brand’s other tool deals in the official Amazon storefront here.
